source_note: Commission Order reconciling Southwestern Public Service Company's (SPS) fuel and purchased-power costs for 2002-2003, PUCT Docket 29801 (SOAH 473-04-6558), Item 432, issued December 19, 2005; 21 pp. A concluded contested fuel-cost reconciliation (complements the still-open El Paso Electric 57149). PDF: interchange.puc.texas.gov/Documents/29801_432_499091.PDF. Listed for reference (metadata-only).
